# Perplexity API Platform Documentation - Complete Content Extraction

## Main Headings & Sections
- Overview (primary page section)
- Documentation Index (reference to https://docs.perplexity.ai/llms.txt)
- Available APIs

## API Services Listed
1. Agent API - "Access third-party models with web search tools and presets"
2. Search API - "Get raw, ranked web search results with advanced filtering and real-time data"
3. Embeddings API - "Generate high-quality embeddings for semantic search and RAG pipelines"

## Use Case Categories
- Search The Web
- Use Any Frontier Model
- Filter your sources
- Structure Results

## Featured Models Mentioned
- openai/gpt-5.4
- openai/gpt-5.2

## Code Examples Provided (Languages)
- Python
- TypeScript/JavaScript
- cURL/Bash

## Key Features Demonstrated
- Web search queries (batch processing)
- Web search filtering (domain filters, recency filters)
- Response format structuring (JSON schema)
- Tool integration (web_search tool)

## Platform Description
"Power your products with unparalleled real-time, web-wide research and Q&A capabilities"
